templates.name: Default approval
templates.description: Single email-based approval gate using the platform's generic mrkdwn body. Drop-in choice for any "ask the human before doing the thing" workflow — replace the inputs with the action you're gating.

templates.name: Promote rules
templates.description: Promote rule changes from a source workspace into a target workspace, gated on a human approval. Operators wire source + target + the email-or-Slack channel that should receive the approval prompt; the workflow waits up to 30 minutes for the click-through, applies the diff, and emits an audit event. Migrated from the workflow-service built-in registry — install per-tenant to keep using it after the binary stops shipping the in-Go-code copy.

templates.name: Smoke test
templates.description: Single-step print workflow that proves the engine substrate works end-to-end (Kafka trigger -> queue -> worker -> checkpoint -> complete). Install in a fresh tenant after a deploy or schema change to verify wiring; tear down after.
